name: marp-tools
description: Marp presentation toolkit: create slides, design themes, fix visual issues, export to PDF/PNG/PPTX, and set up build pipelines.

skills.name: marp-markdown
skills.description: Create and edit Marp Markdown presentation files. Supports slide content writing, frontmatter configuration, and directive application.

skills.name: marp-knowledge
skills.description: Comprehensive knowledge base for the Marp presentation framework. Provides detailed information on syntax, directives, theme system, image syntax, and more.

skills.name: marp-theme-creator
skills.description: Create new custom Marp themes. Supports theme design in SCSS/CSS, color palette definition, typography settings, and slide class implementation.

skills.name: marp-visual-fix
skills.description: Diagnose and fix Marp slide display and layout issues. Resolves text overflow, image size problems, and PDF export issues.

skills.name: marp-export
skills.description: Export Marp slides to various formats (PDF, PNG, PPTX, HTML).

skills.name: marp-theme-builder
skills.description: Build Marp theme pipelines. Supports SCSS→CSS compilation, sample image generation, Makefile setup, Git hooks, and GitHub Actions CI.
